svg.title: Deep Topic and Algorithm Taxonomy
svg.desc: One-figure taxonomy of the repository's deep and non-foundational algorithm lanes, grouped by family.

text.font-family: IBM Plex Sans, Inter, Arial, sans-serif
IBM Plex Sans, Inter, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Scope: deep and non-foundational lanes only. Foundations, basic combinatorics, and beginner greedy routes are intentionally omitted.
